props.name: create
props.comment: React element rendered as an inline-create entry at the bottom of the options menu.

props.name: createHintValue
props.comment: Internal sentinel placeholder value passed to ra-core to mark the create option; override only when it conflicts with a real choice value.

props.name: createItemLabel
props.comment: Label for the create menu entry shown when the filter is non-empty. Defaults to the ra.action.create_item translation key.

props.name: createLabel
props.comment: Hint label for the create menu entry shown when the filter is empty. Defaults to the ra.action.create translation key.

props.name: createValue
props.comment: Sentinel value tagging the create option in the list. Defaults to '@@ra-create'; override only when that string conflicts with a real choice id.

props.name: InputLabelProps
props.comment: Props forwarded to the FormLabel element rendered above the trigger button (e.g. className, style).
